title: My minecraft Fabric
description: Optimized pleasant Modpack in Vanilla style
body:
Hello! this modpack is made for version 1.21, it may not be finished yet, I will update it. ![FabricMF](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3c6a1d7f0a1ea04df401297bbae4087e9f217169.png)
_This mod pack is made on fabric (IT WILL NEVER APPEAR ON FORGE, NEOFORGE, AND QUILT!)_ ![Modpack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3248700daf5979318aa4bbef0f5c01b1bc52d05.png)
**Pleasant modpack for minecraft for playing alone or with friends**

# Advantages of the modpack:


- Excellent optimization
- Lots of beautiful biomes
- Lots of new mobs for your world!
- New updated mechanics
- And also a lot of other things that I won't be able to fit here.


**A little below you can see some of the main mods of this modpack**


- New biomes (WilderWild,Terrestia,NatureSpirit),
- New mobs (ZombieHorseSpawns,Friends&Foes,NetherDepthsUpgrade and more!),
- New optimization mods (ParticleCore,BadOptimizations,FerriteCore,ModernFix),
- New client mods (SnowyLeaves,DamageNumbers,Zoomify),



- You can also add your own resource packs, mods and shaders! (**for convenience, Resourcify is installed here. You can add resource packs and shaders directly in the game or add them in the launcher anyway**)



# Tutorial


<details>
<summary>How to download this ModPack</summary>

1. Download and install the Modrinth app on your computer
2. Download the version of the modpack you need
3. Open the Modrinth app
4. Launch the downloaded version of the modpack
5. Wait until he downloads all the mods and shaders and then you can start the game

**Have a good game!**
![MFgo!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4cadeecd109d57d447b18172ac84fa88285f748.png)

</details>

# Info

- Why is this modpack only for 1.21? - I chose the newest version because it has the most content, although not all mods have switched to it yet, but there are those that were not on the old versions
- Why fabric? - I chose fabric because I think it's the most popular right now, unlike forge, neoforge and quilt
- Why can you see mistakes in some words? - I don't live in America or the UK and English is almost an unknown language for me, so I use a translator
- Why was this modpack created? - It was created for a pleasant game of minecraft with friends or alone there are no mods for imbalance here there are mods for a quiet game
